title: taraxacum officinale subsp. alpinum
intro: Taraxacum officinale subsp. alpinum is a subspecies of the dandelion plant, known for its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum officinale subsp. alpinum include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Taraxacum officinale subsp. alpinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used as an ingredient in various herbal supplements.
